name: Peak Design Travel Backpack 45L
description: The Travel Backpack from Peak Design has expansion zippers along its spacious main compartment so you can adjust the capacity from 30 to 45L.

features.Key Features:: Versatile, Multi-Configuration Backpack | Spacious, Expands from 30 to 45L | Designed for Internal Compartment System | Compartments for Gear, Clothes | Rear, Front, and Side Access | 15" Laptop and 10" Tablet Pockets | Hidden Side Pockets, Front Pocket | Organizational Pockets | 2 Bottle Pockets/Tripod, Monopod Holders | 4 Exterior Handles, Weather Resistant
features.What’s in the box?: Peak Design Travel Backpack | 2 x Cord Hook Carry Strap | Sternum Strap | Limited Lifetime Warranty
